assets.name: Why Your Revenue Forecast Is Wrong (And How to Fix It)
assets.description: High-traffic SEO blog targeting 'improve sales forecast accuracy' queries. Opens with benchmark data on forecast miss rates in B2B SaaS.

assets.name: The RevOps Analytics Maturity Model
assets.description: Framework for assessing where a company sits on a 4-level analytics maturity curve (Reactive → Predictive). Includes self-assessment quiz.

assets.name: Product Tour: Revenue Dashboard in 90 Seconds
assets.description: Short screen-recorded product tour. Shows connecting a CRM, auto-building a pipeline dashboard, and drilling into a deal health alert.

assets.name: From Spreadsheet to Dashboard: RevOps Automation Workshop
assets.description: 60-minute hands-on workshop walking through connecting a CRM and building your first automated pipeline dashboard. Live Q&A at the end.

assets.name: NovaTech Analytics for Finance: CFO One-Pager
assets.description: One-page executive brief showing how CFOs use NovaTech Analytics for board-ready revenue reporting, cash flow visibility, and scenario modeling.

assets.name: Vertex HR Went From Monthly to Real-Time Revenue Reporting
assets.description: Case study with Vertex HR Software (150 employees). Replaced Excel-based board decks with live NovaTech dashboards — saved 8 hrs/week per manager.

assets.name: Free Trial — NovaTech Analytics
assets.description: Primary conversion page. Highlights 4-day time-to-value, 80+ integrations, and free 14-day trial with no credit card required.

assets.name: Trial Activation Sequence (5 emails)
assets.description: Onboarding email sequence triggered on trial signup. Day 0: welcome + connect your first source. Day 2: first dashboard checklist. Day 5: team sharing tips. Day 10: upgrade nudge. Day 13: expiry warning.

assets.name: Integrations Data Sheet: 80+ Connectors
assets.description: Technical one-pager listing all native connectors by category (CRM, Marketing, Finance, Product, Support). Includes refresh frequency and auth methods.
